coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 6:30 at 75%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/2. 10:00 at 85%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/2. 82-85% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/2. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/2. 10:00 at 85%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 10:00 at 85%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 47% done. 0 intervals left. 13 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 13min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 5:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 85% for 10:00. Then 3min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 85% × 10:00. Then 3min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 85%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 85% for 10:00. Then 3min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 85% × 10:00. Seated, 85-90 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 31 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 20min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 90% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 31 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 90% into session. 60%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
